Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Remnants]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Remnants are left behind by animals and humans as they advance in power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Remnants are made of bright emerald color and appear as mere sketches or outlines rather than accurate depictions of what they were in life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Remnants are made entirely of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Remnants can be used to pull carriages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Remnants used as oxen appear to be made from heat haze or fine glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Remnants make sounds like thunder and whips when they move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Remnants are creatures that can carry aspects of light and are attracted to Samara’s ring.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Remnants are stronger and smarter than spirits from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Remnants can be acidic green in appearance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Remnants are described as parasites or Goldsigns attached to hosts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Remnants are creatures that can attack or simply behave aimlessly like sitting or counting clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Remnants climb up from corpses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Some Remnants can fly.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Crimson lions in a stone room are Remnants sealed to the defense of the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The crimson lion Remnants were once Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The guards of the Akura fortress are Remnants that are fifteen feet tall and look like dried lizard-corpses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Remnants carry halberds that blaze with black-and-violet flame, which is a different breed of dragon's fire than Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Remnants were left by Lords on the same Path and cultivated by the Akura clan to match Heralds in power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Remnants can pull sacred artists through the sky.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Remnants rise from the bodies of dragons like sunset-colored serpents.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Remnants are black dragons of dark red madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Northstrider has a facility where his team studies Remnants with unusual authority.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Six powerful Remnants were sealed in scripted tanks around the edges of a cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Remnants in the cave were either Heralds or possessed unique authority and powerful will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin's Remnants include a crackling winged person made of diamond and a twisted dragon-man.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Remnants are razor-toothed fish that seek out blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The archway at the mountain peak was etched with scripts to ward off Remnants.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
